footer.builtWith: Built with Astro, shadcn/ui and Tailwind v4.

notFound.headline: Page not found.
notFound.body: That road doesn't lead anywhere on Truvis. Let's get you back on a route that does.
notFound.metaDescription: We couldn't find that page on Truvis. Head back to the landing page or browse the blog.

serverError.headline: Something went wrong on our end.
serverError.body: We're looking into it. Give it a minute and try again — or head somewhere that's working.
serverError.metaDescription: Truvis hit an unexpected error. Give it a moment and try again.
